security.title: Security
security.set_password_hint: If you haven't set a password (e.g. logged in via OAuth), or forgot your current password, please use the

api_keys.title: API Keys
api_keys.description: API keys allow you to publish content via external applications.
api_keys.new_key_hint: Please make sure to copy your API key now. You won't be able to see it again for security reasons.
api_keys.name: Name

notifications.title: Subscription & Notifications
notifications.subscription_management_desc: Manage your post subscription preferences. Choose categories or tags you are interested in to get updates as soon as possible.
notifications.notification_methods_desc: Manage high-value reminders across email and browser push. Security alerts always stay on, while comment replies and system notifications can be adjusted per channel.
notifications.security_fixed_hint: Security alerts are high-priority messages and remain enabled at all times.

email.title: Email Notifications
email.description: Send important updates to the email address linked to your account for reliable cross-device delivery.

email_type_desc.comment_reply: Email me when someone replies to one of my comments.
email_type_desc.system: Deliver completed async tasks and other important system messages by email.
email_type_desc.security: Deliver login security and other high-priority security events by email.

browser.title: Browser Notifications
browser.description: Browser delivery preferences stay enabled by default. Even if permission has not been granted yet, you can save the policy first and authorize the browser later.

notifications.web_push_desc: Configure how offline browser alerts are delivered. Once enabled, comment replies, system messages, and security reminders can reach your browser even when you are away.
notifications.browser_status_site_disabled: The site has not finished Web Push configuration yet. Please try again later or contact an administrator.
notifications.browser_status_unsupported: Your current browser or device does not support Web Push.
notifications.browser_status_granted: Browser notifications are enabled. You can receive high-value reminders while offline.
notifications.browser_status_denied: Browser notifications were blocked. Re-enable them in your browser settings.
notifications.browser_status_default: You have not granted browser notification permission yet. You can authorize it first and then save your delivery preferences.

browser_type_desc.comment_reply: Send a browser alert when someone replies to your comment.
browser_type_desc.system: Deliver browser alerts for completed async tasks and other important system messages.
browser_type_desc.security: Deliver browser alerts for login security and other high-priority security events.
browser_type_desc.marketing: Marketing messages currently do not enter the Web Push channel.

notifications.marketing_desc: Receive functional updates, activity recommendations and other email suggestions from the Momei team.

commercial.title: Monetization
commercial.subtitle: Configure your personal social links and sponsorship info. These will be displayed in the author card at the end of your articles.
commercial.social_desc: Add your social media, personal website, or other external links here.
commercial.donation_desc: Configure your donation/sponsorship links or QR codes, making it easier for readers to support you.
commercial.label: Custom Label
commercial.locales_hint: Leave empty to show in all languages
commercial.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this link?
